global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with a clear focus on the app interface and call-to-action.
global.main_message: QuickFork offers quick dinner solutions with late-night deals.

elements.label: Purple background
elements.description: A solid purple background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: App interface
elements.description: A simplified app interface with two rectangular windows and two circular buttons, all in a lighter shade of purple.

elements.label: QuickFork logo
elements.description: The logo 'QuickFork' displayed in a bold, modern font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Dinner in minutes
elements.description: The text 'Dinner in minutes' is prominently displayed in a large, white font.

elements.label: Late-night deals
elements.description: The text 'Late-night deals available' appears in a smaller font beneath the main message.

elements.label: Start now button
elements.description: A call-to-action button labeled 'Start now' in a bold font, positioned at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Dinner in minutes Late-night deals available

elements.label: QuickFork headline
elements.description: The headline 'QuickFork' is displayed at the top in a prominent, eye-catching font.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A clear and inviting button at the bottom that encourages users to take action.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, QuickFork, dinner in minutes, late-night deals
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the app interface is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Dinner in minutes, Late-night deals available, QuickFork, Start now
